global.description: The ad features a clean, modern design with a focus on the brand and its offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, rounded rectangle with a soft blue background, creating a subtle backdrop for the ad.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A medium-sized square with rounded corners, slightly lighter than the background, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A small, circular shape in a lighter shade of blue, positioned within the central area.

elements.label: Decorative rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle with rounded corners, also in a lighter blue, positioned near the bottom of the central area.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Secure & simple No hidden fees', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The word 'SwiftStack' in a large, bold font at the top of the ad, colored in white against the blue background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Discount label
elements.description: A small, white text label at the bottom left corner displaying '-30%' to indicate a discount.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist blue with white text, secure service offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple No hidden fees, SwiftStack, Shop now, -30%
